headlines.headline: Yorval Partners secures $320M contract with a major logistics provider

sentiment.reasoning: Securing a $320M contract is a clear positive indicator of demand and revenue generation.

sentiment.reasoning: Routine patent filings are standard business maintenance and do not imply immediate financial impact.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
